name: Nzoia Upper Basin Management
blocking_factor: Cross-county coordination across Bungoma and Kakamega
notes: Nzoia River drains Mt Elgon and Cherangany Hills. Upper basin management requires coordination across Trans Nzoia, Bungoma, and Kakamega counties. Joint basin committee established 2019. Decisions are advisory only.

name: Mount Elgon Catchment Reforestation
notes: 15000 ha reforestation target. 6200 ha planted as of 2023. Catchment degradation continues to increase flood peak flows into Nzoia. Community forest associations active in 8 sub-locations.

name: Kitale Town Stormwater Upgrade
blocking_factor: Budget re-allocated to road works 2021 and 2022
notes: Design complete. County prioritised road works over drainage. Main collectors on Kenyatta St and Hospital Rd remain undersized for 10-year storm. CBD floods annually.

name: Cherangany Hills Landslide-Flood Risk Mapping
blocking_factor: Not integrated into county planning approvals
notes: Risk map completed 2022. High-risk corridors identified in Saboti and Kiminini. County planning department has not incorporated map into development approval process.

name: Nzoia River Cross-Border Flood Protocol
blocking_factor: Uganda upstream water management not coordinated
notes: Protocol to coordinate flood releases from Ugandan catchment areas. Draft shared with Ugandan counterparts 2021. Not ratified. Upstream deforestation in eastern Uganda driving increasing flood peaks.
